General.Name: Xinyuan Property Management Service (Cayman) Ltd
General.Description: Xinyuan Property Management Service (Cayman) Ltd. provides property management services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers its property management services to residential properties and nonresidential properties, such as offices, commercial complexes, industrial parks, business parks, schools, and public buildings. It also provides a range of value-added services, such as asset management, space management, retail, and delivery services; pre-delivery services comprising sales assistance, property sales venues management, and property sales venues warm-up services; and consulting services, such as advisory, and intermediary and management services. In addition, the company offers firefighting, intelligent engineering, landscaping engineering, and planning engineering and construction services; property decoration, real estate marketing, trading, event planning and execution, and intelligence and landscape engineering services. Further, the company provides elevator installation, repairment, and maintenance; housekeeping; real estate agency; and network technical services. Xinyuan Property Management Service (Cayman) Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Xinyuan Property Management Service (Cayman) Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xinyuan Real Estate Co., Ltd.
General.Address: Building (B9), Hengtong Business Park, No.10, Beijing, China
